name: Application workspace shell
notes: Root SPA shell that orchestrates the entire DocVault UI: auth gate, navigation, document browsing, search, upload, and document preview in a single-page layout.

Authentication gate: renders LoginForm exclusively when AuthContext.isAuthenticated is false; renders the full workspace (Header + Sidebar + SearchBar + DocumentGrid + optional PreviewPanel) when true.
Auth bypass: on mount, AuthContext.checkAuthBypass calls GET /api/health — if response.data.skipAuth is true the user is auto-authenticated as dev@docvault.local without credentials.

Login flow has a known crash (FR-007): POST /api/auth/refresh returns { session: {...} } instead of { token: '...' }, causing response.data.token.split('.') to throw a null-reference TypeError — login is effectively blocked unless the backend DEV_SKIP_AUTH env var is active.
No client-side routing: section changes (documents, upload, search, tags) update App.state.activeSection only; the URL stays at / throughout.
DocumentGrid is wired via an imperative ref (this.documentGridRef) so the SearchBar can call DocumentGrid.handleSearch() directly — an anti-pattern that couples sibling components through the parent.
